property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
22:18:38.945 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.hostadmin.HostadminApplicationTests]: HostadminApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:18:39.044 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.hostadmin.HostadminApplication for test class com.example.hostadmin.HostadminApplicationTests
